title: Kenja's Walkman
description: Adds a walkman and a lot of cassettes tapes to Minecraft
body:
![Logo_Kenja_Walkman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2c215e26fdab30959c143ef1dc009c29543e6b.png)


## About Kenja's Walkman Get ready to explore infinite worlds with the perfect tool to beat boredom. With Kenja’s Walkman, you can now listen to music using cassette tapes, just like music discs. The mod currently includes over thirty cassette tapes. ![Cassettes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff44f8e62a686bf9d84f264c02986bad24e49503.png) ### Compatibility with Other Mods To enhance the experience, this mod adds custom cassette tapes for music discs from other mods. Currently supported mods include:
Mods
  • Supplementaries
  • Mowzie's Mobs
  • Quark
  • Biomes O' Plenty
  • The Twilight Forest
  • Upgrade Aquatic
  • Environmental
  • Ars Nouveau
### Languages Kenja's Walkman currently supports English, Spanish, Catalan, and Chinese. However, support for French, German and Polish is planned in the coming weeks. ## Future Plans
Spoiler of future plans

These features are planned ideas I would like to implement. However, not all of them may be completed.

  • A block to record cassette tapes, replacing the current crafting recipes
  • Update the Walkman sprite when held by the player or when a cassette tape is inserted
  • Mods I would like to include cassette support for:
    • Alex's Mobs
    • The Aether
    • and more...
## Support Me This is not my full-time job, and developing these projects takes a significant amount of time. If you enjoy my work and would like to support it, feel free to visit my Ko-fi page:
